deck_ono7.name: Ono-Sendai Cyberspace 7
deck_ono7.desc: A classic cyberspace deck — your ticket onto the matrix.

deck_hosaka.name: Hosaka Mark IV
deck_hosaka.desc: A heavier corporate deck with room for more software.

ram_chip.name: 4MB RAM Chip
ram_chip.desc: More room to run programs while you're jacked in.

sk_cyberspace.name: Cyberspace skillchip
sk_cyberspace.desc: The basics of running the matrix.

sk_icebreak.name: ICE Breaking skillchip
sk_icebreak.desc: Take an ICE apart before it takes you apart.

sk_evasion.name: Evasion skillchip
sk_evasion.desc: Slip a tail on the street or in the matrix.

sk_bargain.name: Bargaining skillchip
sk_bargain.desc: Talk a better price out of anyone.

sw_comlink.name: Comlink 2.0
sw_comlink.desc: Basic handshake software for database links.

sw_hammer.name: Hammer
sw_hammer.desc: A blunt attack program. Bashes weak ICE.

sw_probe.name: Probe
sw_probe.desc: Scouts a data fortress for soft spots.

sw_doorstop.name: DoorStop
sw_doorstop.desc: Holds a node open while you work.

sw_jammies.name: Jammies
sw_jammies.desc: Masks your icon from hostile ICE.

sw_logicbomb.name: Logic Bomb
sw_logicbomb.desc: A heavy offensive payload. Use it sparingly.
